name: MAGIC PAWS Maritime Gazetteer
description: Controlled maritime gazetteer for inferred geolocation. MAGIC PAWS / MARITIME PHASE ZERO. Expanded global v3: Europe, Middle East, Indian Ocean, Africa, Americas, Indo-Pacific and Arctic. Exact issue-body coordinates override inferred places. v3 adds generic North Sea, German Bight and Baltic Sea topic-area anchors for safer event geolocation.
